["Travel Channel's New Series "Ghost Loop" Resurrects Emotionally Charged Moments to End Terrifying Cycles of Trapped Paranormal Activity"](http://www.thefutoncritic.com/news/2019/11/19/travel-channels-new-series-ghost-loop-resurrects-emotionally-charged-moments-to-end-terrifying-cycles-of-trapped-paranormal-activity-332311/20191119travel01/). *[The Futon Critic](/wiki/The_Futon_Critic "The Futon Critic")*. first_paragraph: ***Ghost Loop*** is a television series that premiered on the [Travel Channel](/wiki/Travel_Channel "Travel Channel") in January 2020.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The show features Matt Lytle, Eric Vitale, Chris Califf, Kris Star, and Sean Austin all of whom attempt to investigate alleged paranormal activity within households.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

| *Ghost Loop* | |
| --- | --- |
| Country of origin | [United States](/wiki/United_States "United States") |
| Original release | |
| Network | [Travel Channel](/wiki/Travel_Channel "Travel Channel") |
| Release | January 2020 (2020-01) |

***Ghost Loop*** is a television series that premiered on the [Travel Channel](/wiki/Travel_Channel "Travel Channel") in January 2020.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The show features Matt Lytle, Eric Vitale, Chris Califf, Kris Star, and Sean Austin all of whom attempt to investigate alleged paranormal activity within households.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
